# Page Title: About IIT & IIT Jammu | IIT Jammu

# About IIT and IIT Jammu

## About IIT and IIT Jammu

The Indian Institutes of Technology (IITs) are India’s premier higher education institutions, globally respected for excellence in science, engineering, technology, and research. Established as Institutes of National Importance, the 23 IITs have set benchmarks in academic rigor and innovation, producing leaders across academia, industry, and entrepreneurship. Admission to IITs is through the highly competitive JEE Advanced examination, ensuring that these institutes attract the nation’s most talented students.

Among the newest members of this distinguished family, IIT Jammu was established in 2016 under the mentorship of IIT Delhi. In less than a decade, the institute has grown rapidly into a vibrant hub of learning and innovation. Its permanent campus, spread across 400 acres in Jagti, Jammu, provides a modern environment designed to nurture creativity, research, and holistic student development.

IIT Jammu offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs across engineering, sciences, and humanities. With strong emphasis on interdisciplinary research, the institute is advancing work in frontier areas such as renewable energy, quantum technologies, advanced materials, artificial intelligence, and sustainable cooling. Supported by more than 100 national and international collaborations, IIT Jammu is steadily shaping itself into a globally connected center of excellence and a driver of innovation for the future.

# Page Title: Student Clubs | IIT Jammu

# Student Clubs

Explore the diverse range of technical and cultural clubs fostering innovation, creativity, and community at IIT Jammu

### Coding Club

Programming & Development

Focuses on competitive programming, coding competitions, and software development skills for students.

### Fintech Club

Financial Technology

Explores innovations in financial technology, blockchain, and digital finance solutions.

### Robo-Sapiens

Robotics & Automation

Dedicated to robotics research, automation projects, and national robotic competitions.

### RE4M

RESEARCH FOR MINDS

Designing and fabricating vehicles for competitions like BAJA and Formula Student.

### SAE Club

Automotive Engineering

Society of Automotive Engineers chapter focusing on automotive design and engineering competitions.

### MESH Club

Mesh of Engineering Science & Humanities

Bridges the gap between engineering, science, and humanities through interdisciplinary activities and projects.

### Astria-Za

Astronomy & Space Sciences

Focuses on astronomy, space exploration, and astrophysics activities and research projects.

### Kritash Club

Social Wellbeing & Community Service

Creates hope through education and social service. Working to develop awareness, help underprivileged, and overcome social challenges since 2017.

### BeatStreet Club

Dance Club

Dedicated to various dance forms, choreography, and dance performances with regular practice sessions and competitions.

### Malang Club

Music Club

Promotes musical talents, instrument learning, vocal training, and musical performances among students.

### Foot Tinkerers Club

Food Innovation & Culinary Arts

Explores culinary arts, food science, and innovative cooking techniques and food culture.

### Abhivyakta Club

Literary Club

Promotes literary activities, creative writing, poetry, storytelling, and language arts among students.

### Anisoul Club

Animation & Digital Arts

Focuses on animation, digital art, graphic design, and multimedia content creation.

### EBSB Club

Ek Bharat Shreshtha Bharat

Promotes cultural unity and diversity through inter-state cultural exchange programs.

### Dramatizers Club

Theatre & Drama

Dedicated to theatrical performances, drama productions, and acting skill development.

### Wellness Club

Health & Mental Wellness

Promotes physical and mental health awareness, wellness activities, and stress management.

### NAC Club

National Activities & Community Service

Focuses on community service, social activities, and national development initiatives.

# Page Title: Cultural Events | IIT Jammu

# Cultural Events

Experience the rich tapestry of Indian culture through vibrant festivals and celebrations that bring our diverse community together at IIT Jammu

## Festivals

A home away from home where we celebrate every festival with joy and unity

### Diwali

Festival of Lights

The most awaited festival at IIT Jammu, celebrated with rangoli competitions, traditional dances, and a spectacular fireworks display that illuminates the entire campus.

### Holi

Festival of Colors

A joyous celebration where the campus comes alive with vibrant colors, traditional sweets, folk music, and students from all backgrounds unite in the spirit of togetherness.

### Ganesh Chaturthi

Lord of New Beginnings

A spiritually enriching celebration featuring beautiful Ganesh idols, devotional songs, traditional prasadam distribution, and cultural performances honoring Lord Ganesha.

### Raksha Bandhan

Bond of Protection

A heartwarming celebration of sibling bonds where students tie rakhis, share sweets, and create a family atmosphere on campus for those away from home.

### Independence Day

National Pride

A patriotic celebration featuring flag hoisting, cultural performances, speeches honoring freedom fighters, and exhibitions showcasing India's journey to independence.

### Republic Day

Constitutional Celebration

A grand commemoration of our Constitution with parade ceremonies, cultural programs highlighting diverse Indian traditions, and discussions on democratic values.

# Page Title: Student Festivals | IIT Jammu

# Student Festivals

Celebrating creativity, culture, and innovation at IIT Jammu

## Anhad

Anhad, the annual cultural and techno fest of IIT Jammu, is a vibrant confluence of innovation and creativity. From high-energy coding battles, robotics challenges, and design contests to dazzling performances, talent showcases, and immersive experiences, the fest offers something for everyone. It is a true celebration of ideas, artistry, and youthful spirit, uniting minds from across the nation.

## Udyamitsav

Udyamitsav, the flagship entrepreneurship fest of IIT Jammu, is a dynamic platform that blends innovation, strategy, and inspiration. With engaging events like startup pitches, marketing challenges, meme incubators, and stock market simulations, alongside thought-provoking talks from entrepreneurs, social activists, and influencers, the fest nurtures both ideas and impact. Adding to the vibrancy are cultural evenings and DJ nights, making Udyamitsav a celebration of enterprise and energy.

## Nexus

Nexus’25 at IIT Jammu is the institute’s flagship annual techno-fest, bringing together innovation, creativity, and problem-solving through a diverse lineup of events. With intellectually stimulating contests like Maths, Physics, and Astronomy Bowls, as well as exciting competitions in stock, crypto, and algorithmic trading, the fest blends technology with real-world applications. Events like water rocket launches, and RC throttle races add to the thrill, making Nexus’25 a vibrant celebration of science, engineering, and innovation.

## Pragyaan

Pragyaan is an open day event at IIT Jammu designed to ignite curiosity in STEAM (Science, Technology, Engineering, Art, and Mathematics) among young minds. Through live demonstrations, interactive hands-on sessions, and insightful discussions, it provides a platform for students to explore cutting-edge technologies like robotics, AI, AR/VR, drones, and astronomy. The event also brings together school principals and educators in a collaborative conclave to discuss the integration of modern technology in education and inspire the innovators of tomorrow.

International Conference on Quantum Technology - Register Now   |

# Welcome to
Office of
International Relations

## Director's Message

Indian Institute of Technology Jammu

Welcome to the Indian Institute of Technology Jammu, one of India's youngest IITs, established in 2016. In just a few years, IIT Jammu has become a vibrant hub of academic excellence, research, and innovation. Guided by our philosophy, 'Empowering Minds, Transforming India,' we strive to provide world-class education while fostering creativity, diversity, and global outlook.

Nestled in the Shivalik hills of Jammu and Kashmir, our campus offers a serene environment for holistic student growth. Here, students engage in experiential learning, hands-on research, and creative problem-solving that prepares them to be leaders of tomorrow.

Our Training and Placement Cell connects students with industry, and we recently celebrated our first placement season. IIT Jammu fosters interdisciplinary research across engineering, sciences, and humanities, with strategic emphasis on renewable energy, quantum science and technologies, advanced signal processing, materials innovation, computer science, sustainable cooling solutions for climate resilience, and artificial intelligence/machine learning (AI/ML). Our Central Instrumentation Facility, SAPTARSHI, hosts advanced laboratories that empower students and faculty to publish in high-impact journals and actively engage in technology transfer and startup initiative.

Through flagship initiatives such as InventX and RISE-UP, IIT Jammu actively nurtures innovation, entrepreneurship, and translational research. With over 100 national and international collaborations, we are building strong academic and industry partnerships worldwide, opening new opportunities for our students and faculty.

At IIT Jammu, we are committed to pushing the frontiers of knowledge and contributing to a sustainable society. Welcome to our journey of learning, innovation, and transformation.

### Prof. Manoj Singh Gaur

Director, IIT Jammu

Prof. Manoj Singh Gaur

# Page Title: Mission & Vision | IIT Jammu

# Mission & Vision

Guiding principles that shape our future and global impact

## Our Vision

To establish IIT Jammu as a globally connected institution of excellence where knowledge flows seamlessly across borders, collaborations spark innovation, and diversity fuels creativity, empowering our students, faculty, and partners to co-create solutions for a sustainable and inclusive future.

## Our Mission

### Forge Impactful Collaborations

Build enduring partnerships with leading global universities, research centers, and industries to advance knowledge and innovation.

### Enable Global Mobility

Provide enriching opportunities for students and faculty through exchanges, joint research, and international academic programs.

### Shape Future Leaders

Equip students and faculty with global exposure, skills, and perspectives that prepare them to lead in academia, industry, and society.

# Page Title: Overview | IIT Jammu

# Overview

Discover our commitment to global excellence and international collaboration

## About Our Office

The **Office of International Relations** at IIT Jammu is the institute’s window to the world. It builds bridges across borders through academic, research, and cultural linkages with leading global universities, industries, and organizations. As IIT Jammu grows as a hub of innovation and excellence, the office drives its international footprint by:

- **Student and faculty exchanges** for global exposure.
- **Collaborative research initiatives** with international partners.
- **Hosting scholars and delegations** from across the world.

#### Office of International Relations

Global Connections Driving Innovation

Comfortable living spaces designed to promote academic focus and social interaction among students.

Girls Hostel

Girls Hostel

Comfortable and well-equipped living quarters fostering a supportive community environment.

Healthcare Facility

On-campus medical facility providing healthcare services and emergency care for students and staff.

# Page Title: Sports & Recreation | IIT Jammu

# Sports & Recreation

Discover the vibrant sports culture at IIT Jammu through our Sports fests and clubs

## Sports Fests

Annual sporting events that bring together athletes from across the campus and beyond

### Pahal

Fresher's Sports Fest

Pahal helps freshers break the ice and connect with their seniors and peers.

### Pravaah

Inter-Department Sports Fest

Pravaah is a branch-vs-branch event where students compete with spirit.

### Inter-Gen

InterYear Sports Fest

InterGen is a Inter Year contest where all students from different batches compete in teams.

### Convoquer-Gen

Inter-College Sports Fest

Convoquer is an inter-college contest with teams from Jammu colleges.

## Sports Clubs

Active sports clubs fostering athletic excellence and team spirit

### Cricket Club

Premier Cricket Team

Represents IIT Jammu in inter-collegiate tournaments and conducts regular practice sessions.

### Football Club

Soccer Excellence

Dedicated to promoting football culture with regular training and competitive matches.

### Basketball Club

Court Champions

Focuses on developing basketball skills and participating in regional championships.

### Volleyball Club

Net Warriors

Promotes volleyball through regular practice sessions and inter-college competitions.

### Badminton Club

Smash & Rally

Offers a mix of recreational and competitive play, with sessions for skill development and fitness.

### Pool Club

Cue Control

Provides a relaxing yet competitive environment for cue sports enthusiasts to improve and compete. training.

### Table Tennis Club

Ping Pong Pros

Provides platform for table tennis enthusiasts to improve skills and compete.

### Athletics Club

Track & Field

Focuses on track and field events, training for various athletic competitions.

### Chess Club

Strategic Masters

Encourages strategic thinking and organizes regular chess tournaments and workshops.

### Indoor Games Club

Fun & Focus

Hosts a variety of indoor games like carrom, darts, and board games for recreation and competition.

### Esports Club

Digital Arena

Brings together gaming enthusiasts for tournaments, team play, and skill development in popular esports titles.

## Sports Facilities

State-of-the-art facilities to support athletic excellence and recreational activities

### Gymnasium

Well-equipped gym with modern fitness machines, free weights, and training space.

### Basketball Court

Outdoor and indoor courts for regular practice and tournaments.

### Volleyball Court

Dedicated sand and hard-surface courts for competitive and recreational play.

### Football Field

Well maintained football field with proper markings and goal posts.

### Cricket Practice Nets

Practice nets with turf pitch for regular training and skill improvement.

### Multi-Purpose Sports Complex

Indoor facility for badminton, table tennis, pool, squash and recreational activities.
